description: Routing should preserve both strong and weak coop matches when the source includes useful signal wrapped in surrounding noise.

routings.rationale: Even with boilerplate program text around it, the extract clearly names community-led estuary monitoring and measurable restoration outcomes that fit the coop's current funding focus.
routings.suggestedNextStep: Keep it in the review queue and compare it with the other coastal monitoring leads before drafting.

routings.rationale: The same extract also carries a weaker but still useful training signal, so the learning-oriented match should stay visible instead of being discarded.
routings.suggestedNextStep: Save the weaker match as a research thread and revisit it if the main estuary lead advances.
